name: Caesar Mayo Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop and mash the anchovy fillets on a cutting board.
2. Add the chopped anchovies to a bowl with the mayonnaise and mix well.
3. Stir in the Dijon mustard, black pepper, lemon juice, and Worcestershire sauce.
4. Fold in the Parmesan cheese until fully incorporated.
5. Cover the mixture and chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
6. Suggested dippers: seafood, deli roast beef or turkey, radishes, broccoli, cauliflower, snow peas.
